policies.notes: Trademark-derived artifacts should be reviewed and refreshed at least every 45 days.
Derived Wikidata brand supplements should be reviewed and refreshed at least every 45 days.
Derived impersonation vocabulary should be reviewed when the maintained route and role sources are refreshed.
Derived composite-risk rules should be reviewed when the maintained impersonation vocabulary changes.
Community profanity lists should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Public insult lists should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Library-backed profanity datasets should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Structured profanity imports should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Library-backed profanity datasets should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Library-backed profanity datasets should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Documentation-derived reserved routes should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Filtered reserved-name package imports should be reviewed at least twice per year.
Stable normative role-mailbox names change rarely.
Normative Windows reserved-name extracts should be reviewed annually.
